prompt: Create a dark, cinematic isometric anime illustration of a lonely exhausted young man in a tiny futuristic capsule apartment floating in a black void. The room is shown as a cutaway 3/4 overhead diorama, with thick rounded sci-fi walls, a raised loft bed along the back wall covered in rumpled dark bedding, a cramped desk under it, an open laptop showing lines of code, small glowing monitors, books, cables, notes, empty cups, snacks, takeout containers, laundry, trash, and clutter covering the floor. The character lies face-down on the messy floor in the center-left, barefoot, wearing a dark T-shirt and shorts, one arm stretched toward the desk, looking drained and incompetent. Use dim warm desk-lamp lighting as the main light source, with heavy shadows, muted browns and charcoal blacks, soft painterly anime detail, melancholy late-night atmosphere, and a sense of burnout and isolation. Include visible room details: a wardrobe with hanging shirts on the left, a small shelf with three cute figurines or plush mascots, a ladder leading to the loft bed, a narrow kitchenette or utility corner on the right with sink, bowls, bottles, and a wall calendar, plus scattered papers and electronics everywhere. Around the room in the surrounding black void, add exactly seven faint miniature memory/island vignettes: 1) a lit sports stadium at upper left, 2) a handheld game console at left, 3) a small group of anime friends or idols at lower left, 4) a telescope on grass at bottom left, 5) a ferris wheel amusement park at upper right, 6) a small forest cottage scene at far upper right, and 7) a small plate of food floating at mid-right. Make the vignettes ghostly and dim so the apartment remains the focus. No captions, no readable text except indistinct code-like marks on the laptop. Aspect ratio 3:2, highly detailed, moody, atmospheric, no watermark.
